milestones.title: Initiate Movement and Object Interaction
milestones.description: The player begins the level by moving the character 'Baba' to the right. Upon movement, Baba immediately interacts with the 'ROCK IS PUSH' rule by pushing the row of rocks blocking the path.

milestones.title: Clear Obstacles
milestones.description: The player continues moving right, successfully pushing the rocks out of the way to clear a direct path to the target object (the Flag). This demonstrates the successful execution of the puzzle's solution.

milestones.title: Trigger Win Condition
milestones.description: The player character reaches and touches the Flag. Since the rule 'FLAG IS WIN' is active, this action satisfies the victory condition for the level.

milestones.title: Level Completion
milestones.description: The 'CONGRATULATIONS!' text appears on screen with visual effects, confirming that the level has been successfully completed.
